nodes.label: Van Hire London Success Image
nodes.description: A white large panel van (Ford Transit style) parked on a London street with Georgian townhouse architecture in the background. The van is unbranded, clean, and presented in a professional marketing context suggesting a van hire service. The setting is a upscale London residential street with iron railings and brick buildings. This appears to be a hero/feature image for a van hire landing page or success/confirmation page.

nodes.label: Eitaa Logo
nodes.description: SVG logo for Eitaa, an Iranian messaging app (similar to Telegram). Orange-colored path forming the Eitaa brand icon. Used in the radlink application likely as a social/messaging platform icon for sharing or linking via Eitaa.

nodes.label: Google Logo SVG
nodes.description: Google branded logo SVG asset using official Google colors (blue #1374e9/#4086f4, red #eb4132, yellow #fbbd00, green #31aa52) plus the wordmark 'Google' in gray (#5f6368). Used as an icon for Google OAuth sign-in button in the application.

nodes.label: iGap Logo
nodes.description: SVG logo for iGap, an Iranian messaging application. The logo depicts a spiral or swirl shape composed of layered green-toned paths (ranging from light #edf6e5 to dark #4eb95b), forming a recognizable brand mark with a white center. The design uses multiple overlapping curved segments to create depth and a circular/vortex aesthetic on a 500x500 viewBox.
